回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英文(二) (English(ll))	開課班級 : 日大學英文	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 戚常卉	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
Students can easily appreciate the major themes and diversified cultures in the textbook, and then will be able to acquire critical reading and thinking skills and develop deeper understanding and multi-faceted perceptions of the world’s multiculture. It aims to develop students’ reading comprehension, vocabulary skills, critical thinking, and to promote cross-cultural communication. 


2.教學綱要
Unit 9 Nature
Unit 10 The Life and Death of Julius Caesar
Unit 11 A New Way of Learning
Unit 13 The World of Fandom
Unit 14 What Are You Like
Unit 15 Strange Sports
Unit 16 The Future of Farming

6.成績評定及課堂要求
1. Quizzes: 20%; 2. Midterm exam: 30%; 3. Final exam: 30%; 4. Attendance & class participation 20%  
1. Be on time for the class 2. Self-respect at all aspects. 3. No smart phones allowed. There will be no make-up quizzes.
